title: Heavy Duty Shelf Brackets 6 x 8 Inch – 4 Pack L Shape Wall Mounted Metal Brackets for Shelves & Bookshelves, Decorative Support Brackets - White
features: REUSABLE SHELF BRACKET: The wall bracket features high strength and durability. Rounded corners design with no sharp edges to avoid scratching you and your family. Safer to use!
SIZE PACK: 200mm/8 inches long, 150mm/6 inches high, 30mm/1.2 inches wide. Supplied with 4 pieces of wall brackets, 8 short telescopic tubes, 8 short screws, 8 long telescopic tubes, 8 long screws.

EASY INSTALLATION: 1. Mark the drilling points for the wall brackets. -2.Drill holes on the wall and put the expansion tubes into the holes. -3.Put the screws through the bracket and insert the expansion tube, tighten the screws and fix the board.

WHY CHOOSE OUR BRACKETS: These shelf support brackets are made of high quality iron with integral moulding technology, high strength, durability, strong load bearing capacity, better rust and corrosion resistance.

WIDE USE: wall mounted shelf brackets are suitable for strong and stable walls, such as concrete or masonry walls. Perfect for small and medium sized bookshelves, display shelves, garden shelves, exterior wall brackets. You can decorate shops, workshops, backyards, trailers, kitchens and bathrooms, etc.
description: Shelf Brackets, 4 Pack L Shape 6 x 8 inch Heavy Duty Wall Mounted Brackets, Modern Decorative Support Brackets for Bookshelf Wall and Garden Shel (White)
